How It Works

Three Steps to Master Any Subject

Smart Academy AI turns your own notes and textbooks into a personalised study session in seconds.

01
📸

Upload Your Notes

Take a photo of your handwritten notes or typed textbook pages. Our AI reads both printed and handwritten text with high accuracy.

02
🤖

AI Generates Questions

The AI analyses your document and creates 5 or 10 personalised questions — from simple recall to complex reasoning — strictly from your material.

03
📊

Learn and Improve

Get instant feedback, worked example explanations, percentage scores, and a detailed report you can share with your teacher or parent.

🎓 For Students & Learners

Learn from YOUR own notes

Upload any document and let the AI turn it into a complete study session.

📤 Step 1 — Upload your document
📸Take a photo of handwritten notes
📄Upload a PDF document
📊Upload an Excel file
⚡ Step 2 — Choose what to do
📝
Generate a Quiz
Personalised questions from YOUR notes — 5, 10, 15 or 20 questions
📄
Summarize Document
Clear, concise summary of your document in your language
⭐
Key Points
The most important facts extracted and listed for quick revision
🧑‍🏫
AI Tutor — Talk or Type
Ask questions by voice or text. Get step-by-step explanations instantly
📥
Download Word Report
Save your full study session as a Word document to keep or share
🔊
Read Aloud
Have the AI read your summary or answers out loud in your language
🔬 Researcher / Professional

The most powerful AI analysis tool

Using TWO independent AI models to analyse and verify every answer — so you can trust the results.

"Unlike any other AI tool — LLM 1 analyses your document, LLM 2 independently verifies and corrects it. You get a confidence score on every answer, so you always know how much to trust the result."

⚙️ How it works — DualMind Pipeline
S0
Detect
→
S1
Decompose
→
S2
LLM 1 Analyse
→
S3
LLM 2 Verify
→
S4
Output
→
S5
Score
🌐 Works for any domain
⛏️ Geology & Mining 🏗️ Civil Engineering ⚕️ Medicine ⚖️ Law 💰 Finance 🌱 Agriculture 💻 Technology 📊 Research
✅
Dual verification
Two AI models cross-check every answer
📊
Confidence score
Know exactly how reliable the answer is
⚠️
Flags missing data
Tells you exactly what information is missing
📁
Multi-file upload
PDF + Excel + Photos analysed together
Features

Everything You Need to Excel

Designed for learners, parents and teachers across all levels and subjects.

📖

Reads Handwriting

AI vision reads your handwritten notes directly from photos — no typing needed.

🌍

12+ Languages

Study in English, French, Portuguese, Arabic, Swahili, Zulu, Afrikaans and more.

🎯

Smart Difficulty

Questions progress from simple recall to hard reasoning — always from your document.

💡

Hint System

Request a gentle hint per question without revealing the answer.

📊

Percentage Grading

Every session scored with Distinction, Merit, Credit, Pass or Not Yet grading bands.

📋

Teacher Reports

Generate a printable progress report for your teacher or parent after every session.

🔁

Retry Mode

Retry only the questions you got wrong — with fresh answer options each time.

🏅

Streak Rewards

Build answer streaks and earn milestone celebrations to stay motivated.

🔐

Access Codes

Secure weekly, monthly or yearly access codes — issued by your teacher or admin.

How It Works Pricing Contact 📄 Terms · Refund · Privacy

Refund & Cancellation Policy

Smart Academy AI · smartacademy-ai.com

Refund Policy

Smart Academy AI provides prepaid digital access codes. Once a code is delivered and activated, it is non-refundable as the digital service is immediately available. If a code is not delivered within 24 hours of payment, a full refund will be issued upon request. Refund requests must be submitted via WhatsApp to +27 761 328 664 within 48 hours of payment.

Chargeback Handling

In the event of a chargeback, Smart Academy AI will provide proof of payment, code delivery record, and access logs to dispute the claim. Customers are encouraged to contact us directly on WhatsApp (+27 761 328 664) before initiating a chargeback, as all legitimate disputes are resolved promptly and fairly.

Contact Us

WhatsApp: +27 761 328 664
Email: info@smartacademy-ai.com
Website: www.smartacademy-ai.com

Your code was provided by your teacher or administrator. Codes start with W, M, or Y.

👆 Before you continue:
This code is yours alone. It will activate on this device only.
If you try to use it on another phone or computer, it will be blocked automatically.
Keep it private — do not share.

💡 Tips for Best Results

✓ Best results: 3–5 focused pages rather than entire chapters
